text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's autumn Tenno Sho will go down in
history.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And there's the hot pick, Silence Suzuka! She's
done brilliantly in the graded races up to this
point, but will she manage to hold out to the
end? Let the autumn Tenno Sho begin!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Just as we all expected, Silence Suzuka simply
refuses to give up the lead! She takes first place
once again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Otherworldly Front-Runner, who leaves all
her opponents in the dust like a flash of lightning,
looks rather subdued as she approaches me.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... I'm really sorry for how unreasonable I
was about the race.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I didn't mean to, but I essentially forced you and
Spe into letting me participate...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: But still—I'm so glad I was able to run in the end!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
The scenery was so, so beautiful. My heart is still
pounding just thinking about it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She is unusually talkative, and almost breathless
with excitement. Though I can't help but smile at
her, I am still concerned about her leg.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It's all right, don't worry. I can still do some light
running on it.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
But I think I should focus on recovering for a
while...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Why are you so surprised?
choice_data_list: I never thought I'd hear you prioritize rest.
I never thought I'd hear you prioritize rest.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh. I guess it is a bit out of character for me.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: It's kind of a long story, but...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
When I was turning the third corner during the
race, there was a split second where I couldn't
move my leg.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm sure it was because it was already weakened...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: But I was so afraid, I nearly lost all heart.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I was so close to the scenery I wanted to see so
badly. All I needed to do was push myself a bit
longer...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
But I was scared. I thought about how the next
step I took might be my last. How I might never
be able to run again.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
But then, I heard a voice call out my name—your
voice.
choice_data_list: Oh yeah, I think I was cheering for you...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Your voice made me remember the promise we
made.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
No matter what happens, I'll come back to you. I
promise.
choice_data_list:
I know you will. I'll be waiting for you at the
finish line.

I know you will. I'll be waiting for you at the
finish line.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: And, without thinking, I had taken that next step.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Once I had, I found my stride again, and I was
sprinting past the finish line before I realized it.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
The scenery beyond the finish line was
unbelievably beautiful...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It was then that the thought crossed my
mind—that, together, we can overcome anything
that stands in our way.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I thought the Tenno Sho would mark the end of
my athletic peak, but I realized it's far too early
to decide something like that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The glow of the setting sun makes her fervent
expression sparkle brilliantly.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Deep in my heart, I still want to see more and
more beautiful scenery, and to push my limits
even further.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I know I can manage it, so long as I'm with you.
choice_data_list:
Is that why you want to take time off to
recover?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: That's right.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her soft smile betrays a rare sense of
embarrassment.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...Once my leg is healed, let's go out in search of
more beautiful scenery.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the Tenno Sho becomes a critical turning
point in our journey together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After focusing on her recovery, Silence Suzuka is
back to full health, and we're ready to challenge
her limits again!
